ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "abbr_player_name" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the player */,
  "gsis_id" TEXT /* GSIS ID of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's position */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's team */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started playing professionally */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's conference */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Full name of the position */,
  "position_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season took place */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, postseason) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game took place */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular, playoff, championship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game stat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stat belongs to */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards for the player in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards for the player in the game */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Touchdowns for the player in the game */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions for the player in the game */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles for the player in the game */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks for the player in the game */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions for the player in the game */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals for the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team game stat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stat belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the stat belongs to */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards for the team in the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the game */,
  "total_passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards for the team in the game */,
  "total_rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards for the team in the game */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers for the team in the game */,
  "total_penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties for the team in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season stat */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stat belongs to */,
  "total_passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards for the player in the season */,
  "total_rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards for the player in the season */,
  "total_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns for the player in the season */,
  "total_receptions" INTEGER /* Total receptions for the player in the season */,
  "total_fumbles" INTEGER /* Total fumbles for the player in the season */,
  "total_sacks" INTEGER /* Total sacks for the player in the season */,
  "total_interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions for the player in the season */,
  "total_field_goals" INTEGER /* Total field goals for the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season stat */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the stat belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the stat belongs to */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins for the team in the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total losses for the team in the season */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "total_turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the team in the season */,
  "total_penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties by the team in the season */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances by the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game outcome */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the outcome belongs to */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went to overtime */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* The margin of victory (winning score - losing score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game took place */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the playoff (e.g., Wild Card, Divisional, Conference Championship) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went to overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "championship_games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game took place */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went to overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championship_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championship_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_championship_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
